summary: Small bulk PR touching one stage file and one item file. It simplified generated-looking locals in grCastle_801CDFD8 and replaced a MWERKS_GEKKO inline assembly implementation of it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk with C that calls it_8026B894, recovers Item* via GET_ITEM, and uses a volatile pointer read/compare against the Ness yoyo item var field.

key_files.role: Stage Castle function cleanup in grCastle_801CDFD8.
Ness yoyo item event function changed from MWERKS_GEKKO inline assembly/NOT_IMPLEMENTED split to C.

what_changed.description: Removed temporary params, params2, neg_one, zero, base_value, and final_value locals from grCastle_801CDFD8. The function now reads grCs_804D6970->xA into a single range local, calls HSD_Randi(range) only when nonzero, writes grCs_804D6970->x8 + rand_result directly to gp->gv.castle9.xD4, and assigns -1/0 literals directly to the other castle9 fields.

Removed an #ifdef MWERKS_GEKKO inline assembly body and the non-Gekko NOT_IMPLEMENTED fallback for it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk. Added a C body using GET_ITEM(gobj), it_8026B894(gobj, ref_gobj), a volatile pointer to ip->xDD4_itemVar.nessyoyo.x10, and a discarded ternary comparison to ref_gobj.

smart_moves.description: The grCastle change improves reviewability by collapsing decompiler-style one-use locals into direct field and literal assignments while preserving the explicit range local used for HSD_Randi.
The item change removes inline assembly and expresses most of the function in C using existing item access patterns, including GET_ITEM and the typed nessyoyo item-var arm.

decomp_lessons.lesson: One-use generated locals for constants and simple field loads can often be removed in favor of direct field/literal assignments when the resulting source remains clear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed params2/neg_one/zero/base_value/final_value and direct assignments added

decomp_lessons.lesson: Inline assembly wrappers can sometimes be replaced by narrow C that preserves the visible call and memory access shape; in this slice, the C replacement still uses a volatile pointer expression, so the exact matching tactic should be treated as PR-local evidence rather than a general style rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed MWERKS_GEKKO asm body and added C body with volatile owner_ptr

naming_conventions.name: range
naming_conventions.context: Replaced random_range in grCastle_801CDFD8 for the local copied from grCs_804D6970->xA before HSD_Randi.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: s32 random_range removed; s32 range added

naming_conventions.name: ip
naming_conventions.context: Used as the local Item* recovered from GET_ITEM(gobj) in it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk.

naming_conventions.name: owner_ptr
naming_conventions.context: Local volatile pointer to ip->xDD4_itemVar.nessyoyo.x10 used for the retained memory comparison in it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Removed MWERKS_GEKKO inline assembly and #pragma push/pop around it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deleted asm void it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk block and pragmas
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: The PR evidence does not include objdiff, build, or adjacent-function regression output, so the match status and blast radius are not proven by this slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used HSD_GObj* volatile* owner_ptr and a discarded ternary comparison to force a read/compare of ip->xDD4_itemVar.nessyoyo.x10 against ref_gobj.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added owner_ptr volatile pointer and (void) ((*owner_ptr == ref_gobj) ? 0 : 0)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Volatile/local codegen steering is a matching tactic that needs verifier evidence before being generalized.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Simplified grCastle_801CDFD8 by removing redundant locals and using direct literal assignments.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: No verifier output is present in the PR slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: grCastle_801CDFD8 cleanup removed decompiler-style one-use locals
accepted_candidate_records.text: In src/melee/gr/grcastle.c, grCastle_801CDFD8 was simplified by replacing temporary params and constant locals with direct grCs_804D6970 field reads and direct -1/0 assignments to gp->gv.castle9 fields.

accepted_candidate_records.title: it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk inline asm replaced with C plus volatile read tactic
accepted_candidate_records.text: In src/melee/it/items/itnessyoyo.c, it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk changed from a MWERKS_GEKKO inline assembly implementation and NOT_IMPLEMENTED fallback to a C body calling it_8026B894 and forcing a volatile read/compare of ip->xDD4_itemVar.nessyoyo.x10 against ref_gobj.

source_update_candidates.title: Investigate Ness yoyo item-var field x10 role in it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk
source_update_candidates.text: The PR compares ip->xDD4_itemVar.nessyoyo.x10 against ref_gobj after calling it_8026B894. This may be useful as field-role evidence, but the PR slice does not prove a semantic name beyond the local owner_ptr variable.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential typed-field/field-role evidence should be reviewed against current headers and other callsites before promoting a semantic field fact.

source_update_candidates.title: Volatile discarded comparisons as narrow matching tactics need explicit verification
source_update_candidates.text: This PR uses a volatile pointer plus discarded ternary comparison to preserve a read/compare while removing inline assembly. Existing standards already caution that volatile locals and matching tactics need evidence; curator may decide whether this PR should be added as an example rather than a new rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added volatile owner_ptr and discarded comparison
source_update_candidates.reason: The tactic is concrete in the PR, but no verifier evidence is loaded, so it should not be generalized without curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not claim grCastle_801CDFD8 or it_2725_Logic59_EvtUnk matched from this slice alone; no objdiff/checkdiff/build evidence is present.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; there are no review comments or reviews in the loaded evidence.
Do not promote owner_ptr as the canonical semantic name for xDD4_itemVar.nessyoyo.x10 without additional source, symbol, or callsite evidence.
